name: ikl-search
purpose: Semantic + keyword search over the Industrial Knowledge Library; returns ranked records with provenance.

transformation.statement: SearchQuery -> ranked[IKL Record] by semantic proximity

reasoning.evidenceModel: one vector hit = one piece of evidence; hits are not independence-checked
reasoning.notes: score 0.81 here means 'this record is semantically close to the query' — NOT 'supported by independent evidence'. Contrast a Patent/causal engine whose 0.81 would mean three independent evidences. No reasoning_trace is emitted yet (gap G8).

consumes.name: query
consumes.description: Search request. Layer filter is optional; limit is clamped to 100.

layer.description: Optional IKL layer key to restrict results (e.g. 'products', 'raw-materials', 'mechanisms').

produces.name: results
produces.description: Ranked matches. Each item carries the hydrated record (with its provenance source) and a similarity score.

score.description: Cosine similarity in ~[0,1]; higher is closer. NOT a calibrated confidence (see gap G2).

snippet.description: Indexed text the match was found in.

record.description: The hydrated IKL record, including its `source` (provenance).

confidence.notes: Per-item `score` is cosine similarity (1 - cosine distance), not a calibrated probability. No set-level confidence is emitted yet (gap G2).

cost.notes: One embedding of the query + one pgvector ANN search + N hydration row-fetches. Unmeasured (gap G5).

latency.notes: Dominated by query embedding (local model warm vs. API cold-start) + vector search. Not yet measured/emitted (gap G5).

dependencies.name: ikl_embeddings
dependencies.notes: Separate pgvector collection from Fresco rag_documents.

dependencies.name: all-MiniLM-L6-v2 (or configured EMBEDDING_MODEL)
dependencies.notes: Local transformers.js, or HF/OpenAI API, with a hash fallback.

dependencies.name: IKL layer tables (ikl_* + ikl_sources)
dependencies.notes: Used to hydrate matches and attach provenance.

failureModes.condition: layer filter is not a known IKL layer
failureModes.result: rejected with the list of valid layers

failureModes.condition: local model and embedding APIs all fail
failureModes.result: degraded: falls back to a hash embedding (low-quality ranking)

provenance.notes: Each result's `record.source` is the ikl_sources row. No consolidated envelope-level provenance list yet (gap G3).
